headline: Use representative cycles as interpretable bridge hypotheses
shortExplanation: Cycles provide inspectable pathways between areas before a stable topic label dominates.
takeaway: Treat loop-derived bridges as candidates for focused literature review, not as deterministic forecasts.

headline: Read yearly structure, not only yearly volume
shortExplanation: Topology-derived summaries help separate boundary-heavy and closure-heavy periods.
takeaway: Combine annual H1 and closure summaries with venue narratives to discuss field reorganization.

headline: Complement predictive ranking with structural interpretation
shortExplanation: Competitive ranking can coexist with interpretable reconstruction of why candidate links are plausible.
takeaway: Use topology as a structural lens that augments, rather than replaces, citation and embedding-based methods.
